title: career-ops.steering-queue.dismissed v1
description: Emitted by job-search-se's server/steeringRoutes.js DELETE handler when a career-ops-queue entry (career-ops/data/steering-queue.json) is dismissed without an answer, closing the silent-dismiss gap left by career-ops.steering-queue.answered.v1. Pairs with career-ops.steering-queue.requested.v1's id as the correlation key so hearth-api can clear the phone notification card and remove the matching Liaison feed insight. Distinct from career-ops.steering.answered.v1, which is an unrelated behavioural-memory-steering concept.

id.description: steering-queue.json entry id (8-char hex), matching the id from the paired requested.v1 event.

question.description: The question that was dismissed, for a readable log/notification without re-reading steering-queue.json.

dismissed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the entry was dismissed.
